violations.text: (Beverages ) were observed stored on the floor in the (walk in cooler and retail area ). Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 04/21/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the (retail shelves and window panels ) have an accumulation of dust and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 04/21/2025
Toilet is restroom observed in poor repair. Observed missing toilet seat cover. New Violation. Correct By: 04/21/2025
Outside refuse area observed with an accumulation of litter and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 04/21/2025

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the (retail and refuse) area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 04/21/2025

The floors walk in cooler have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 04/21/2025
